summary: Iteration 9 testing completed for Hönsgården app updates. All features tested: Registration validation, consent text change, Google login, forgot password, and premium features. Fixed one bug in Dashboard.tsx (isPremium -> premium?.is_premium).
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ FIXED: Dashboard.tsx line 584 had 'isPremium' instead of 'premium?.is_premium' - this was causing weather tips premium check to fail
✅ server.py line 660-666: Correctly validates name (required) and marketing consent (required)
✅ Login.tsx line 458-477: Both consent checkboxes have required class and * indicator
✅ Login.tsx line 539: Terms modal correctly references 'honsgarden.se' not 'Aurora Media AB'
✅ Login.tsx line 75-78: Google OAuth login button functional on welcome screen
✅ Login.tsx line 299-305: Forgot password link present on login form
✅ Premium.tsx line 161-222: Contains all 12 premium features including AI-rådgivare, Vädertips, Hälsologg, Kläckningsmodul
seed_data_creation: Test user created with 7-day trial premium for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 verified all requested features. Webapp was rebuilt after Dashboard.tsx fix. Test file test_iteration9_registration.py can be used for regression testing. Test user testuser2@example.com/password123 has trial premium.

details.terms_checkbox: Has * required indicator and required class
details.marketing_checkbox: Has * required indicator and required class

details.api_response: Returns 400 with 'Du måste godkänna att ta emot information från oss'

details.aurora_media_removed: No mentions of Aurora Media AB

details.forgot_form: Form with email input and submit button
details.api_response: Returns success message without revealing if email exists

details.ai_radgivare: AI-rådgivare 'Agda' - Personliga tips baserade på din flock och situation
details.vadertips: Vädertips - Anpassade råd baserade på väderprognosen
details.halsologg: Hälsologg - Dokumentera sjukdom, vaccination och behandlingar
details.klackningsmodul: Kläckningsmodul - Håll koll på kläckningar med påminnelser
details.ekonomijamforelse: Ekonomijämförelse - Jämför vinst/förlust månad för månad

details.code_verified: Dashboard.tsx line 584-606 has premium check for weather tips
details.premium_user: Weather tips visible for premium/trial users
details.non_premium_user: Shows 'Vädertips är en Premium-funktion' with upgrade button

ui_tests_summary.test: Welcome screen has Google login button
Registration form has all required (*) indicators
Registration form has Google login button
Login form has Google login button
Login form has Forgot password link
Weather modal shows tips for premium users

bug_fixed.fix: Changed 'isPremium' to 'premium?.is_premium' for weather tips premium check
bug_fixed.impact: Weather tips premium lock was not working correctly for non-premium users
